re_audit.notes: Earlier runtime lanes failed before candidate or post-boot confirmation (evidence/files/vm-tooling-staging/cpu-idle-runtime-20260327-072057/summary.json and evidence/files/vm-tooling-staging/cpu-idle-runtime-20260327-232151/summary.json), and the older benchmark lane failed before workload start (evidence/records/power.disable-cpu-idle-states/behavior-lane.log). Minimal VMware smoke then succeeded (evidence/files/vm-tooling-staging/vm-tooling-minimal-diagnostic-20260328-200634/summary.json), minimal direct regwrite succeeded and restored the bundle to missing (evidence/files/vm-tooling-staging/cpu-idle-minimal-regwrite-20260328-201526/summary.json), and the final excluded-baseline stepwise package completed apply, reboot, WPR start, WPR stop, guest-side ETL existence, host copy-back, restore, and post-restore verification (evidence/files/vm-tooling-staging/cpu-idle-runtime-20260329-015521/summary.json and research/notes/power-disable-cpu-idle-states-stepwise-orchestration-20260329.md). The record remains a final decision-gate B because the raw bundle is still not an app-ready supported control surface.
